subject: Your Amazon order has shipped
body: Hello, your order #113-8832910-1001221 has shipped and will arrive by Tuesday. Track your package in your account. Thank you for shopping with Amazon.

subject: Urgent: Verify your PayPal account now
body: Your account will be suspended unless you verify immediately. Act now to avoid permanent lock. Click below and confirm identity.

subject: Final notice: Account locked due to unusual activity
body: Final notice. Your online banking access is locked. Verify your account details and update billing now. If no response within 24 hours your account will be suspended.

subject: Immediate action required: payroll account verification
body: Hi team member, this is HR. Immediately confirm your payroll details to avoid delayed salary. Last chance before cutoff. Use internal verification endpoint 192.168.1.45.

subject: ASAP wire transfer needed for confidential acquisition
body: Please process an urgent wire today. Reply with bank account, routing number, and SWIFT details. Final notice, this is time-sensitive and confidential.

subject: You are worthless
body: You are worthless trash and an idiot. We hate your team and will ruin your day unless you comply now.
